idea-plugin.name: Code Line Tracker
idea-plugin.description:
Code Line Tracker gives you real-time visibility into your coding activity, right in the status bar. Ever wondered how many lines you actually write, refactor, or delete in a session? Now you can see it at a glance.

Features

  • Live Line Counter — See +added and -deleted lines updating in real-time as you code
  • Commit Mode — Automatically activates when you open the Commit panel, showing VCS diff stats for your staged changes
  • Per-File Breakdown — Click the widget to see detailed stats for each file you have touched
  • File Selection — Select specific files in the popup to see aggregated stats for only those files
  • Commit Selected — Exclude files from commit directly from the popup, then press Commit Selected to open the Commit panel with only your chosen files
  • Changes Tab Decoration — Each changelist shows its own diff totals based on the files it contains

Why Use It?

  • Track your daily coding output for standups and reports
  • Prove your productivity — especially useful when your company tracks lines-per-commit metrics
  • Get a quick overview before committing: how big is this change?
  • Zero configuration — install and it just works

How It Works

  1. Session Mode — Tracks every edit in real-time using git diff
  2. Commit Mode — Auto-switches when the Commit panel opens, calculates actual VCS diffs for staged files
  3. Click the Total : N || +N -N widget in the status bar for the full per-file breakdown
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.29 — Per-Changelist Diff Stats

  • Each changelist folder now shows its own diff totals based on the files it contains
  • The "[CLT] Temporarily Excluded from Commit" folder shows excluded files' totals separately

1.1.25 — Real-Time Commit Selection

  • Instant changelist sync — Unchecking a file in the popup immediately moves it to the excluded changelist; checking it moves it back to Changes
  • Commit Selected button — Opens the Commit panel with only your selected files ready to commit
  • New display format: Total : XX || +N -N
  • Excluded changelist renamed to "[CLT] Temporarily Excluded from Commit" for clarity
  • Excluded files are automatically restored when the Commit panel closes or the plugin is disposed

1.1.22 — Commit Mode Fix & Total Counter

  • Commit Mode now works correctly — Switched from git diff --cached to git diff HEAD since IntelliJ does not stage files until commit
  • Added total line count (added + deleted) to status bar, popup, and Changes tab decorator

1.1.20 — Accurate Real-Time Tracking

  • Bug fix: Files are now saved to disk before running git diff — previously, in-memory edits were not detected
  • Bug fix: Added DocumentListener with 1.5s debounce for real-time change detection on every edit
  • Bug fix: Removed unversioned/untracked files from diff output — only tracked files are shown

1.1.18 — Git Diff Engine Rewrite

  • Bug fix: Separated stderr from stdout to prevent git warnings from corrupting diff output
  • Bug fix: Removed strict .git directory check — plugin now works in subdirectories of git repos
  • Bug fix: Added 10-second timeout to prevent process hangs
  • Added --no-renames flag for accurate per-file line counts
  • Fallback for repos with no HEAD commit
